scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: You could have opened with something less hostile.

scene.speaker: Kain
scene.line: I could also juggle knives. Neither would improve the truth.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: Enough. If you are staying, you will speak plainly.

scene.speaker: Kain
scene.line: Plainly? Fine. I do not trust your crown. I trust your disgust. That is why I am here.
